zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Clifford於大約1221年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾騰波瑞時，他的父親Sir Roger Clifford34歲，母親Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham44歲。他於1243年與Countess Hawise Botterell結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年4月3日享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾比 多雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Clifford于大约1221年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾騰波瑞时，他的父亲Sir Roger Clifford34岁，母亲Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham44岁。他于1243年与Countess Hawise Botterell结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年4月3日享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾艾比 多雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Clifford was born about 1221, in Tenbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Roger Clifford, was 34 and his mother, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, was 44. He married Countess Hawise Botterell in 1243. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 3 April 1286, at the age of 66, and was buried in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Clifford est né environ 1221, à Tenbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Clifford, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Sibyl d’Ewyas Lady of Burneham, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Countess Hawise Botterell en 1243. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1286, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Clifford um 1221 in Tenbury, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Clifford 34 und seine Mutter Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham 44. Er hat 1243 Countess Hawise Botterell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. April 1286 im Alter von 66 Jahren und wurde in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Clifford è nato il circa 1221 nel Tenbury, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Roger Clifford, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Countess Hawise Botterell nel 1243. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 aprile 1286, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Cliffordが約1221年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアテンブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Cliffordは34歳，母Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burnehamは44歳であった。1243年にCountess Hawise Botterellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1286年4月3日に66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Clifford(이)가 대략 1221년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 텐버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Clifford(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1243년 Countess Hawise Botterell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 4월 3일 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1221, em Tenbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger Clifford, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Hawise Botterell em 1243. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de abril de 1286, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Clifford родился около 1221 г. в местности тенбури, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Clifford было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Hawise Botterell в 1243 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 апреля 1286 г. в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Clifford nació aproximadamente 1221, en Tenbury, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger Clifford, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Countess Hawise Botterell en 1243. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de abril de 1286, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
